en.hero.label: UX Designer
en.hero.title:
Designing experiences
people actually want.
en.hero.sub:
I work at the intersection of research, systems thinking,
and visual clarity to build products that feel effortless.
en.work.heading: Selected Work
en.about.heading: About
en.about.p1: I'm a UX/UI designer with a background in research and systems design. I believe good design is invisible — it removes friction, builds trust, and makes complex things feel simple.
en.about.p2: Currently open to new opportunities and collaborations.
en.about.value.experience: UX Research, Interaction Design, Design Systems

no.work.heading: Utvalgte prosjekter
no.about.heading: Om meg
no.about.p1: Jeg er en UX/UI-designer med bakgrunn innen forskning og systemdesign. Jeg tror at god design er usynlig — den fjerner friksjon, bygger tillit og gjør komplekse ting enkle.
no.about.p2: Åpen for nye muligheter og samarbeid.
